Name: Damascus Clad 9Cr18Mov Oval Stabilized Wood Chukabocho 190 mm LKJCB10001
Short description:
Key Features

\n
    \n
  • This all-purpose Chukabocho knife was inspired by the Chinese cai dao. It inherited the versatility and was designed to be the ‘workhorse’ knife of the kitchen.
    • \n
  • With both high hardness 9Cr18Mov steel and the Damascus stainless steel used, the knife’s blade keeps a decent sharpness, and is not easily deformed.
    • \n
  • Well-constructed stabilized wood handle added with colored resin. The handle stands out in resistance to daily damages.
    • \n
\n

Good for

\nMeat, Fish, Vegetables, Fruit, Herbs
